YOKA-STRIKE.title: Strike
YOKA-DEFEND.title: Defend
YOKA-BRISTLE.title: Bristle
YOKA-KARMA_STRIKE.title: Karma Strike
YOKA-KARMA_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you received unblocked attack damage last turn, hits twice.
YOKA-FORCE.title: Force
YOKA-BUTTERSNIPS.title: Buttersnips
YOKA-BUTTERSNIPS.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Thorns[/gold] you have.
YOKA-INNER_FIRE.title: Inner Fire
YOKA-DISTORT.title: Distort
YOKA-DISTORT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorns[/gold].
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
YOKA-INCINERATE.title: Incinerate
YOKA-POSSESSION.title: Possession
YOKA-POSSESSION.description:
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
Gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
[red]Vakuu plays your next turn for you.[/red]
YOKA-RAZOR_FORM.title: Razor Form
YOKA-LIQUIDATE.title: Liquidate
YOKA-FULMINATE.title: Fulminate
YOKA-FULMINATE.description:
Gain {TemporaryThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Thorns[/gold] X times.
Next turn, gain {TemporaryThornsNextTurnPower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Thorns[/gold] X times.
YOKA-CRASH.title: Crash
YOKA-CRASH.description:
Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
YOKA-POISE.title: Poise
YOKA-POISE.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
YOKA-ENGORGE.title: Engorge
YOKA-ENGORGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], raise your Max HP by {MaxHp:diff()}.
If not, gain {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
YOKA-PROTOTYPE.title: Prototype
YOKA-PROTOTYPE.description: Whenever you gain or inflict a buff or debuff, gain {PrototypePower:diff()} [gold]Temporary Thorns[/gold].
YOKA-UNFLINCHING.title: Unflinching
YOKA-EXPLOIT.title: Exploit
YOKA-EXPLOIT.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Play and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Next turn, draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:plural:card|cards}.
YOKA-TORMENT.title: Torment
YOKA-TORMENT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you received unblocked attack damage last turn, apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
YOKA-RAG_ON.title: Rag On
YOKA-WEAPONIZE.title: Weaponize
YOKA-BRACE.title: Brace
YOKA-BRACE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
YOKA-BRACE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
YOKA-WALL_OF_THORNS.title: Wall of Thorns
YOKA-STOCKADE.title: Stockade
YOKA-COLLAPSE.title: Collapse
YOKA-SCHEME.title: Scheme
YOKA-LEVERAGE.title: Leverage
YOKA-LEVERAGE.description: If you received unblocked attack damage last turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
YOKA-HYSTERIA.title: Hysteria
YOKA-HYSTERIA.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Whenever you play a card, add a [gold]Burn[/gold] into your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
YOKA-HEDGE.title: Hedge
YOKA-HEDGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you gained or lost [gold]Gold[/gold] this turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] {Repeat:diff()} additional {Repeat:plural:time|times}.
YOKA-DEATH_WISH.title: Death Wish
YOKA-DEATH_WISH.description: Whenever you lose Max HP, add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.
YOKA-TRANSMUTE.title: Transmute
YOKA-TRANSMUTE.description:
Add [gold]Replay[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
It costs an extra {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
YOKA-TRANSMUTE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to add [gold]Replay[/gold] and [gold]Health Cost[/gold] to.
YOKA-HOSTILE_TAKEOVER.title: Hostile Takeover
YOKA-HOSTILE_TAKEOVER.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies. ALL enemies lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
YOKA-FRUSTRATION.title: Frustration
YOKA-FRUSTRATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If you received unblocked attack damage last turn, gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
YOKA-BEATING.title: Beating
YOKA-BEATING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each time you lost HP this combat.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
YOKA-FRAGMENT.title: Fragment
YOKA-SACRIFICE.title: Sacrifice
YOKA-OVERLOOK.title: Overlook
YOKA-HIGH_ROLLER.title: High Roller
YOKA-CRUEL_STRIKE.title: Cruel Strike
YOKA-REAR_HOOK.title: Rear Hook
YOKA-VICTIMIZE.title: Victimize
YOKA-BLOOD_COAGULANT.title: Blood Coagulant
YOKA-POISON_MIND.title: Poison Mind
YOKA-FIRST_CLASS.title: First Class
YOKA-DESPERATION.title: Desperation
YOKA-DESPERATION.description:
Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
Put ALL 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
YOKA-ENCIRCLE.title: Encircle
YOKA-ACCUMULATE.title: Accumulate
YOKA-ACCIDENT.title: Accident
YOKA-ACCIDENT.description: Whenever you gain or lose [gold]Gold[/gold], a random enemy takes {AccidentPower:diff()} damage.
YOKA-RECKLESS_STRIKE.title: Reckless Strike
YOKA-RECKLESS_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add a {Gold:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold] cost to a random card and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
YOKA-RUSH.title: Rush
YOKA-RUSH.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
If you draw an Attack, gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
YOKA-MASSACRE.title: Massacre
YOKA-MASSACRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If you gained or lost [gold]Gold[/gold] this turn, hits twice.
YOKA-TOTALITY.title: Totality
YOKA-TOTALITY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you received unblocked attack damage last turn, hits four times.
YOKA-EXPLOSION.title: Explosion
YOKA-EXPLOSION.description:
Deal damage equal to {IfUpgraded:show:thrice|twice} your HP and [gold]Gold[/gold] lost this combat.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.)|}
YOKA-DIVERGE.title: Diverge
YOKA-IMMUNIZE.title: Immunize
YOKA-IMMUNIZE.description: Whenever you receive unblocked attack damage, other players heal {ImmunizePower:diff()} HP.
YOKA-INFUSE.title: Infuse
YOKA-DEGRADE.title: Degrade
YOKA-DEGRADE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each Attack played this turn.
YOKA-AMEND.title: Amend
YOKA-AMEND.description:
Lose {MaxHp:diff()} Max HP.
[gold]Transform[/gold] all Status cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] into [gold]random 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} cards[/gold].
YOKA-REVEAL_WEAKNESS.title: Reveal Weakness
YOKA-LASH_OUT.title: Lash Out
YOKA-LASH_OUT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Discard {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
YOKA-CHARGE_AHEAD.title: Charge Ahead
YOKA-HOLD_OUT.title: Hold Out
YOKA-ENVELOP.title: Envelop
YOKA-ENVELOP.description:
Gain {PlatingPower:diff()} [gold]Plating[/gold].
Put a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
YOKA-ENVELOP.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
YOKA-ATTUNE.title: Attune
YOKA-ATTUNE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
Next turn, put a card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
YOKA-ATTUNE.selectionScreenPrompt: Select a card to put in your Hand.
YOKA-GUARD.title: Guard
